sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103134" key="teratwpo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τερᾰτ-ωπός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n103134.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">marvellous-looking</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τ. ἰδέσθαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg019.perseus-grc1:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Pan.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
